mediapackagev2.originendpoint.CfnAbout: Specifies the configuration parameters for a MediaPackage V2 origin endpoint.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.ChannelGro.Description: The name of the channel group associated with the origin endpoint configuration.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.ChannelNam.Description: The channel name associated with the origin endpoint.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.ContainerT.Description: The container type associated with the origin endpoint configuration.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.Descriptio.Description: The description associated with the origin endpoint.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.HlsManifes.Description: The HLS manfiests associated with the origin endpoint configuration.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.LowLatency.Description: The low-latency HLS (LL-HLS) manifests associated with the origin endpoint.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.OriginEndp.Description: The name of the origin endpoint associated with the origin endpoint configuration.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.Segment.Description: The segment associated with the origin endpoint.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.StartoverW.Description: The size of the window (in seconds) to specify a window of the live stream that's available for on-demand viewing. Viewers can start-over or catch-up on content that falls within the window.

mediapackagev2.originendpoint.Tags.Description: The tags associated with the origin endpoint.
